natal Guru on Oct. 29, 1967 and Mars becomes sextile natal
Mercury on Jan. 4, 1968. He was seriously ill on 1968.3.13 and
had to undergo surgical treatment. The mean natal Rahu
being on 208 deg .. 30'43" there was a close conjunction with
Kuja on Dec. 27, 1967. This can account for the surgery on
April 1, 1968. But what about the highest position in his
carrer which took place on April 20, 1968? We have to rely on
progressed Moon square natal Guru, and on progressed Mars
sextile natal Mercury. This is a way of explaining an event
that has taken place. Once an event takes place, the astrolo
ger can give a thousand reasons as to why it happened. But he
should be able to forecast it earlier. We find this method also
unsatisfactory.

10
Symbolic Directions
The nearest method for the correction of the time of birth is
our theory of symbolic directions. For every completed year
take one degree. Add this to the angles (1, 4, 7, 10), to the
luminaries, and to the planets.
